SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.reaction

Class RunawayReactionAnalyzer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.reaction.RunawayReactionAnalyzer
public class RunawayReactionAnalyzer extends Object
Screening analyzer for runaway (exothermic) reaction excursions.

Implements the standard adiabatic thermal-hazard screening relations used in reaction-hazard assessment (Stoessel, Thermal Safety of Chemical Processes; CCPS Guidelines for Chemical Reactivity Evaluation; DIERS):

  • Adiabatic temperature rise: dT_ad = Q / (m · Cp) where Q = |ΔH_rxn| · n_limiting is the total heat released by complete conversion of the limiting reactant.
  • Maximum temperature of the synthesis reaction (worst-case, adiabatic): MTSR = T0 + dT_ad.
  • Margin to a supplied maximum-allowable temperature (decomposition onset or material limit): margin = MAT - MTSR.
  • Adiabatic time-to-maximum-rate (Townsend & Tou): TMR_ad = Cp · R · T0² / (q0 · Ea) where q0 is the specific heat-release rate at T0 and Ea the apparent activation energy.

This is a HAZOP Other than → runaway reaction screening tool. A RUNAWAY_RISK or marginal verdict, or a gas-generating ("gassy") system, flags the need for a full reaction-calorimetry study and DIERS two-phase emergency-relief design — it does not size relief by itself.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • RunawayReactionAnalyzer

      public RunawayReactionAnalyzer()
      Create a runaway-reaction screening analyzer with no inputs set.

  • Method Details

    • setProcessTemperature

      public RunawayReactionAnalyzer setProcessTemperature(double value, String unit)
      Set the initial process temperature.
      Parameters:
      value - temperature value
      unit - temperature unit ("K" or "C")
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setReactionEnthalpy

      public RunawayReactionAnalyzer setReactionEnthalpy(double value, String unit)
      Set the molar reaction enthalpy of the limiting reactant. By convention an exothermic reaction has a negative value; the magnitude is used for the heat-release calculation.
      Parameters:
      value - reaction enthalpy value
      unit - enthalpy unit ("J/mol" or "kJ/mol")
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setLimitingReactantMoles

      public RunawayReactionAnalyzer setLimitingReactantMoles(double moles)
      Set the number of moles of the limiting reactant available to react.
      Parameters:
      moles - limiting-reactant moles [mol]
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setTotalMass

      public RunawayReactionAnalyzer setTotalMass(double value, String unit)
      Set the total reacting mass explicitly.
      Parameters:
      value - mass value
      unit - mass unit ("kg")
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setSpecificHeat

      public RunawayReactionAnalyzer setSpecificHeat(double value, String unit)
      Set the specific heat of the reacting mixture explicitly.
      Parameters:
      value - specific-heat value
      unit - specific-heat unit ("J/kgK" or "kJ/kgK")
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setMaxAllowableTemperature

      public RunawayReactionAnalyzer setMaxAllowableTemperature(double value, String unit)
      Set the maximum-allowable temperature (decomposition onset or material limit) used as the rating.
      Parameters:
      value - temperature value
      unit - temperature unit ("K" or "C")
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setActivationEnergy

      public RunawayReactionAnalyzer setActivationEnergy(double value, String unit)
      Set the apparent activation energy used for the adiabatic time-to-maximum-rate.
      Parameters:
      value - activation-energy value
      unit - energy unit ("J/mol" or "kJ/mol")
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setInitialHeatReleaseRate

      public RunawayReactionAnalyzer setInitialHeatReleaseRate(double value, String unit)
      Set the specific heat-release rate at the process temperature, used for the adiabatic time-to-maximum-rate.
      Parameters:
      value - heat-release-rate value
      unit - rate unit ("W/kg")
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setAcceptableMargin

      public RunawayReactionAnalyzer setAcceptableMargin(double marginK)
      Set the acceptable margin between the maximum-allowable temperature and MTSR.
      Parameters:
      marginK - acceptable margin [K]
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setGassySystem

      public RunawayReactionAnalyzer setGassySystem(boolean gassy)
      Declare whether the reaction generates permanent (non-condensable) gas. A gassy system always triggers a DIERS two-phase relief screening recommendation.
      Parameters:
      gassy - true if the reaction generates permanent gas
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • setFluid

      public RunawayReactionAnalyzer setFluid(SystemInterface fluid)
      Supply a fluid used to derive the total mass and/or specific heat when they are not set explicitly.
      Parameters:
      fluid - the reacting fluid
      Returns:
      this analyzer for chaining

    • analyze

      public RunawayReactionResult analyze()
      Run the runaway-reaction screening calculation.
      Returns:
      an immutable screening result
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if required inputs are missing or physically invalid

    • validateInputs

      private void validateInputs()
      Validate that the mandatory inputs are present and physically meaningful.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if any mandatory input is missing or invalid

    • resolveMass

      private double resolveMass(List<String> warnings)
      Resolve the total reacting mass from the explicit value or the supplied fluid.
      Parameters:
      warnings - list to which non-fatal warnings are appended
      Returns:
      total reacting mass [kg]
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no mass can be resolved

    • resolveSpecificHeat

      private double resolveSpecificHeat(List<String> warnings)
      Resolve the specific heat from the explicit value or the supplied fluid.
      Parameters:
      warnings - list to which non-fatal warnings are appended
      Returns:
      specific heat [J/(kg·K)]
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no specific heat can be resolved

    • classify

      private RunawayReactionAnalyzer.RunawayVerdict classify(double dTad, double margin, boolean marginExceeded)
      Classify the screening verdict from the adiabatic severity and the margin to the maximum-allowable temperature.
      Parameters:
      dTad - adiabatic temperature rise [K]
      margin - margin = MAT - MTSR [K], NaN if no MAT supplied
      marginExceeded - true if MTSR exceeds the maximum-allowable temperature
      Returns:
      the screening verdict
